query:
SELECT id, name, contact, contactType, source, service, notes, createdAt FROM leads ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
SELECT id, phone, email, firstName, lastName, captureType, message, notes, createdAt FROM leadCaptures ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 20;
